# @codenhub/i18n

> Experimental browser translation management with locale loading, persistence,
> events, and optional DOM synchronization.

Await `init()` before translation, avoid global instances in concurrent SSR,
and call `disconnect()` when DOM observation is no longer owned.

## Documentation

- [Documentation overview](docs/index.md): Purpose, status, and starting points.
- [API and browser behavior](docs/reference.md): Complete exports, DOM, SSR,
  persistence, failures, events, and cleanup.
